description: Leads accounting teams and operations, driving financial strategy, process improvements, and stakeholder reporting.

in_demand_skills: Strategic Financial Planning, ERP Systems (SAP/Oracle), Risk Management, Financial Forecasting, Leadership, Regulatory Strategy, AI-Driven Reporting Tools
